evalDynamicCodeExecution.reason: False positive — this is a security detection pattern that scans for eval() usage in untrusted agent code. It is not dynamic code execution.

networkAccess.reason: Intentional — CustomAdapter is a user-configured HTTP adapter that calls a user-supplied URL (config.url) to connect to external AI endpoints. Network access is the explicit purpose of this adapter.
Intentional — McpSseTransport is an HTTP/SSE transport layer for the MCP protocol. Both the server (createServer) and client (http.request) directions are the explicit purpose of this module.
Intentional — McpSseTransport is an HTTP/SSE transport layer for the MCP protocol. Both the server (createServer) and client (http.request) directions are the explicit purpose of this module.
Intentional — network-ai-server is an opt-in CLI binary that starts an HTTP/SSE server to expose the Network-AI tool suite over MCP. Users invoke it explicitly; it is not a background side-effect.
